decision_rationale: no_per_pass_fps_evidence: the GRX contract requires a per-pass FPS >= 0.95x baseline measured_local comparison before any default enablement (GRX_PLAN GRX.4 exit criteria / GRX_CONTRACT G-GRX-5 single_scene_fps_ratio_min=0.95), and no full baseline or per-pass benchmark comparison for particles_copy exists yet

patch_0022_writeback_is_scaffold: the COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES result is dispatched into the real Godot Transforms SSBO destination while the native Godot particles copy continuation still re-fills every instance every frame as the backstop, so the candidate image cannot change (LDR visual gate max_abs=0/mean_abs=0) and the opt-in Rurix dispatch yields no measured net benefit yet

fill_instances_3d_subset: math parity covers only the COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES 3D subset with align modes ALIGN_DISABLED (0) and ALIGN_BILLBOARD (1) (math_parity_evidence.json status=pending_gpu_dispatch); align modes 2/3/4, the 2D copy mode, the VIEW_DEPTH sort / FILL_SORT_BUFFER path, ORDER_BY_LIFETIME/REVERSE_LIFETIME reindex, trail interpolation, and userdata channels are recorded gaps
does_not_imply: broader particles_copy coverage (2D copy, VIEW_DEPTH sort, lifetime reindex, trail, userdata, align modes 2/3/4) beyond the COPY_MODE_FILL_INSTANCES 3D ALIGN_DISABLED/ALIGN_BILLBOARD subset
net-benefit Rurix dispatch (patch 0022 result writeback is a scaffold; the native Godot particles copy re-fills every instance every frame)

opt_in_requirements: set rendering/rurix_accel/passes/particles_copy/backend = 2 (missing container fails closed to native)

grx025_gate.engagement_subset: 1/7 no-userdata emitter 子集(userdata_count==0 / stride 112);标准 ParticleProcessMaterial(userdata_count==1)出子集

rd_native_default_enable.grx024_visual_parity: GRX-024 floor-limited(粒子非确定,parity==floor)+ 容器 ~1-ULP + GRX-025 leg 交叉印证
